sdlc-missing-repository-abstraction-laye.title: Missing Repository Abstraction Layer for API Data Sources
sdlc-missing-repository-abstraction-laye.description: The project has excellent core simulation and domain layers, with data/repositories handling persistence and API calls. However, there's no centralized repository abstraction that decouples data sources (Room, API) from use cases. This forces use cases to directly manage data source coordination, violating the Repository pattern and making testing and data source switching harder. Adding a repository layer would provide a clean API for data operations and enable proper caching strategies.
sdlc-missing-repository-abstraction-laye.file_hint: Should be added in core-data module alongside existing repository implementations

sdlc-deterministic-event-scheduler-for-n.title: Deterministic Event Scheduler for Narrative Progression
sdlc-deterministic-event-scheduler-for-n.description: The project lacks a centralized, deterministic scheduler for time-based story events and NPC behavioral ticks, risking race conditions and nondeterminism in narrative progression as feature modules grow. A scheduling engine would ensure consistent simulation outcomes across devices and enable reliable testing.

sdlc-missing-input-validation-in-core-ap.title: Missing Input Validation in Core API Endpoints
sdlc-missing-input-validation-in-core-ap.description: The project appears to lack comprehensive input validation in its core API endpoints, which could lead to security vulnerabilities and system instability. A refactor is needed to implement centralized validation logic using a schema-based approach (e.g., Pydantic or similar) to ensure all incoming data is properly sanitized and validated before processing.
sdlc-missing-input-validation-in-core-ap.file_hint: src/api/endpoints.py or similar main API file
